body_excerpt: In CdmaBroadcastSmsConfigsRequestData::encode of cdmasmsdata.cpp, there is a possible stack clash leading to memory corruption. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
